creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Another issue is on libc++-enabled systems libstdc++ from ports cannot be used. theraven@ proposed to link libstdc++ against libcxxrt (like in gcc42 case) but that often requires bleeding edge version of it. 11.0+ release model should accelerate updates adoption but relying on libsupc++ compatibility still leaves some gaps as FreeBSD tries to maintain ABI instead of leaving it to upstream.
